enter_the_context_to_analyze_for_routing: Enter the context to analyze for routing...
explanation_of_why_this_route_was_chosen: Explanation of why this route was chosen
intelligently_route_workflow_execution_t: Intelligently route workflow execution to different paths based on context analysis. Define multiple routes with descriptions, and an LLM will determine which route to take based on the provided context.
response_randomness_level_low_for_consis: Response randomness level (low for consistent routing)
route_to_the_correct_block_based_on_the: Route to the correct block based on the input...
this_is_a_core_workflow_block_intelligen: This is a core workflow block. Intelligently direct workflow execution to different paths based on input analysis. Use natural language to instruct the router to route to certain blocks based on the input.
